rationale: The cited paper is directly aligned with a central decision in the citing study: geographic resource reallocation based on local response rather than BDI, and the citing paper explicitly reports performance against a BDI-based allocation benchmark. Given this conceptual overlap (geographic heterogeneity and reallocation logic), the citation could be serving as a substantive motivation/foundation rather than a purely incidental mention. With only DOI-level match evidence, it is not safely droppable as obvious mention-only.
